name: nn-fintech-enterprises-backend
description: Monorepo Backend for NN Fintech Enterprises

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix services/identity-service && npm install --prefix services/ledger-service && npm install --prefix services/payment-service && npm install --prefix services/trading-service && npm install --prefix api-gateway
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "IDENTITY,LEDGER,PAYMENT,TRADING,GATEWAY" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold" "npm run dev:identity" "npm run dev:ledger" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:trading" "npm run dev:gateway"
